name: Sloppy Jose
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onions, green bell pepper, jalapeno pepper, and garlic in olive oil until the onions are translucent.
2. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is lightly browned.
3. Drain any excess fat from the beef mixture.
4. Stir in salt, black pepper, and cumin, then cook for 1 more minute, constantly stirring to ensure even seasoning.
5. Add ketchup and tomatoes, cover the skillet, and simmer over low heat until the sauce has reduced to a thick consistency.
6. Serve the mixture on toasted burger buns.
